metadata.description: Multi-engine 5-stage autonomous review pipeline with Dual-Engine Consensus. Runs Codex + Gemini concurrently, dedups findings by confidence, auto-fixes until PASS, generates proving tests.

plugins.name: agent-review-pipeline
plugins.description: 5-stage autonomous review pipeline (correctness + impact + adversarial + test-gen + deliver) with Dual-Engine Consensus. Runs Codex and Gemini concurrently by default, boosts confidence on cross-engine agreement, drops findings below 0.60, auto-fixes inline until PASS.
